r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: The multivitamin market is confusing, overpriced, and driven by hype rather than health - leaving you wondering how to get the most benefit for your money without falling for gimmicks or paying for expensive, exotic ingredients you don't need
emotional_amplifiers: So many choices in multivitamins that it's hard to choose between them
Can't we live without the skunkweed?
The multivitamin business is just that: A business. Driven by the bottom line - not your health interests
Do you really want squid mucous or some kind of root extract from Botswana in your multivitamin?
Some vitamin supplement makers spend all their money on advertising and skimp on the ingredients
Do you really want to pay for hype instead of hope for a healthier tomorrow?
Are you paying $80 a month for vitamins? That's more than I pay for groceries
specificity_elements: Whole barrel of cheap pills - pop a dozen a day
"Cadillac of multi-nutrients" pitched by new-age guru on Oprah
Golf-ball sized multi-packs with ox bile and skunkweed extract
Ingredients passing through system without reaching bloodstream
relatability_triggers: You've seen this kind of thing before in other industries
A lot of people believe they don't need a multivitamin
Most of us can't grow our own vegetables or raise our own meat
Today's supermarket shelves stocked with refined, genetically altered, preserved food

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Ultimate Daily Support - a straightforward, scientifically-formulated multivitamin with all essential vitamins and minerals in bio-available form, without expensive exotic ingredients, created by Dr. Douglass with world-renowned biochemists exclusively for health professionals
mechanism_proof_points: Teamed up with world-renowned group of biochemists
Makers of premium quality, lab-tested formulas exclusively for doctors and health professionals
PhDs custom-design supplements targeted to specific needs
Every ingredient evaluated by lab analysis
Manufacturer selected for best reputation for quality, consistency, potency, freshness
Independent industry analysis rated Ultimate Daily Support in top 3% of 500 supplements evaluated
14 evaluation criteria including potency, completeness, absorption, bio-availability
unique_differentiators: Only multivitamin good enough to carry Dr. Douglass' 'Ultimate Guarantee'
Everything you need and nothing you don't
No wacky root extracts, animal secretions, or nonsense
Relatively inexpensive (less than half cost of high-profile multis)
Made exclusively for doctors and health professionals (not mass retail)
First and only full line to carry Dr. Douglass' endorsement

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: All essential vitamins in optimal doses
tactical_breakdown.proof: Listed in detail: A, Beta-Carotene, D-3, E, C, B-complex, etc.

tactical_breakdown.benefit: Strong bones, immune function, heart health
Enhanced absorption and targeted health support

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Suspended in digestible fillers and binders
tactical_breakdown.proof: Top 3% in independent analysis for absorption
tactical_breakdown.benefit: Nutrients actually reach bloodstream, not flushed down toilet

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Give your body a real advantage toward overall health, energy, and longevity with a scientifically-formulated multivitamin that provides comprehensive health-boosting at a wallet-friendly price

promises: Promote a healthy heart and circulatory system
Feel healthier, stronger and more energetic
Compensate for refined, genetically altered, preserved foods
Get nutrients you're not getting from modern food
Optimize nutrition regardless of diet quality

emotional_payoffs: Peace of mind knowing you're covered
Feel good about value for money
lifestyle_benefits: Save money vs. expensive formulas (less than half cost)
No need to take dozen pills like cheap brands
Simple: everything essential in one formula
Lock in low price for at least a year

testimonial_proof.quote: My wife Ann started taking them and she says she would never take any other kind. They have been real helpful for her.

testimonial_proof.quote: My doctor suggested taking a multivitamin. I selected your product because I trust [Dr. Douglass]. It's that simple!

testimonial_proof.name: Heidi Kerchoff, GA
testimonial_proof.quote: I am a highly allergic person and yours is the first multivitamin preparation I have been able to take. My counter was filled with bottles of individual vitamins. Thank you so much!

objection_quality.objection: How do I know this is high quality?
objection_quality.response: Made by biochemists who create premium formulas exclusively for doctors. Every ingredient evaluated by lab analysis. Independent industry analysis rated it top 3% of 500 supplements. Dr. Douglass personally selected the manufacturer for best reputation.

objection_price.objection: Is this another expensive specialty formula?
objection_price.response: Just $1.00 per day. Less than half the cost of high-profile multis. 'An exceptional value.' Much less than those $80/month formulas. Locked-in low price for at least a year with Smart Ship.

objection_absorption.objection: Will my body actually absorb this?
objection_absorption.response: Bio-availability is what separates this from mass-produced cheapies. Top 3% rating in independent analysis specifically for absorption. Not cheap fillers and binders - nutrients reach your bloodstream.

objection_doctor.response: Take the bottle on your next office visit and watch your doctor's eyebrows rise as he reads about everything included. Don't be surprised if your doctor asks YOU how to get some! Consult your physician - I invite you to.

objection_complexity.objection: Do I really need all these ingredients?
objection_complexity.response: Contains ALL the vitamins, minerals, and nutrients necessary for vibrant health, NONE of the ingredients that could cause harm, and NO wacky root extracts or nonsense. Everything you need, nothing you don't. Any good doctor can tell you what each ingredient means to your health.

objection_grocery_store.objection: Why not just buy One-A-Day at the store?
objection_grocery_store.response: Grocery-store formulas in cheap fillers/binders - ingredients pass through without reaching bloodstream. May as well pop a sugar pill! Extra money goes into quality ingredients for maximum potency and absorption, not TV advertising budget.

objection_risk.objection: What if it doesn't work for me?
objection_risk.response: Dr. Douglass' Ultimate Guarantee: Return at any time and for any reason for complete refund, including shipping and handling. Try for at least 3 full months. Don't risk anything (not one penny). No ifs, ands, or buts. No time limits.

objection_trust.response: First and only full line of nutritionals to carry Dr. Douglass' endorsement and no-risk Ultimate Guarantee. After decade of writing newsletters, never found formula good enough to back - until now. Ordinarily scours market for best products, tries them personally, endorses real deal in newsletter. This time went further - teamed with biochemists to create it.

swipe_worthy_elements: "Are you paying $80 a month for vitamins? That's more than I pay for groceries." - William Campbell Douglass II, M.D.
Can't we live without the skunkweed?
The multivitamin business is just that: A business. One that's in large part driven by the bottom line - not your health interests.
Do you really want squid mucous or some kind of root extract from Botswana in your multivitamin?

What's missing in today's glutted multivitamin market is a good, honest, easily absorbable daily formula with all the basic vitamins, minerals, and nutrients you need for day-to-day health - with a price tag that won't induce a coronary.

If you're content with One-A-Day™, this isn't the multi for you. But if you're interested in giving your body a real advantage toward overall health, energy, and longevity, you'll need something more than a 'grocery-store' multi.
Independent industry analysis rates Ultimate Daily Support in top 3% of the 500 supplements evaluated!
That extra money goes into quality ingredients to ensure maximum potency, effectiveness and absorption - not a TV advertising budget.
Dr. Douglass' Ultimate Guarantee: Return at any time and for any reason for a complete refund - including shipping and handling. Not one penny at risk. No ifs, ands, or buts. No time limits.
Can you think of any other company who'd offer you a guarantee like this on a supplement? I doubt it.
